label: Inspiration
description: Defines a temporary pawn inspiration, including eligibility requirements, duration, stat effects, and start/end text.

inspirationClass.label: Inspiration class
inspirationClass.description: C# Inspiration type instantiated at runtime for this inspiration.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# InspirationWorker type that evaluates pawn eligibility for this inspiration.

baseCommonality.label: Base commonality
baseCommonality.description: Relative weight for random selection of this inspiration. Higher values increase how often it is chosen.

baseDurationDays.label: Base duration (days)
baseDurationDays.description: How many in-game days this inspiration lasts before expiring.

allowedOnAnimals.label: Allowed on animals
allowedOnAnimals.description: If true, this inspiration can trigger on animal pawns.

allowedOnNonColonists.label: Allowed on non-colonists
allowedOnNonColonists.description: If true, this inspiration can trigger on non-colonist pawns such as guests or prisoners.

allowedOnDownedPawns.label: Allowed on downed pawns
allowedOnDownedPawns.description: If true, this inspiration can trigger on pawns that are currently downed.

requiredNonDisabledStats.label: Required non-disabled stats
requiredNonDisabledStats.description: StatDefs that must not be disabled on the pawn for this inspiration to be eligible.

requiredSkills.label: Required skills
requiredSkills.description: All listed skills must meet their minimum level for this inspiration to be eligible. Each entry is a SkillDef name with an integer minLevel.

requiredAnySkill.label: Required any skill
requiredAnySkill.description: The pawn must meet at least one of these skill requirements for this inspiration to be eligible.

requiredNonDisabledWorkTypes.label: Required non-disabled work types
requiredNonDisabledWorkTypes.description: All listed WorkTypeDefs must be enabled for the pawn for this inspiration to be eligible.

requiredAnyNonDisabledWorkType.label: Required any non-disabled work type
requiredAnyNonDisabledWorkType.description: The pawn must have at least one of these WorkTypeDefs enabled for this inspiration to be eligible.

requiredNonDisabledWorkTags.label: Required non-disabled work tags
requiredNonDisabledWorkTags.description: WorkTags flags (comma-separated) that must all be enabled for the pawn for this inspiration to be eligible.

requiredCapacities.label: Required capacities
requiredCapacities.description: PawnCapacityDefs that must be non-zero for the pawn to be eligible for this inspiration.

associatedSkills.label: Associated skills
associatedSkills.description: SkillDefs associated with this inspiration. Used for display and for some worker eligibility checks.

minAge.label: Min age
minAge.description: Minimum biological age in years required for a pawn to receive this inspiration.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets applied to the pawn while this inspiration is active. Keys are StatDef defNames; values are float offsets.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Stat multipliers applied to the pawn while this inspiration is active. Keys are StatDef defNames; values are float factors.

beginLetter.label: Begin letter
beginLetter.description: Body text of the letter shown when this inspiration begins. Supports RimWorld substitution tokens.

beginLetterLabel.label: Begin letter label
beginLetterLabel.description: Title of the letter shown when this inspiration begins. Supports RimWorld substitution tokens.

beginLetterDef.label: Begin letter def
beginLetterDef.description: LetterDef controlling the icon, sound, and urgency of the begin-inspiration letter.

endMessage.label: End message
endMessage.description: Message shown when this inspiration expires. Supports RimWorld substitution tokens.

baseInspectLine.label: Base inspect line
baseInspectLine.description: Text shown in the pawn inspect panel while this inspiration is active. Supports RimWorld substitution tokens.

basic-inspiration.label: Basic inspiration
basic-inspiration.description: A standard inspiration with duration, letter text, and inspect line.
